## What

<!-- One paragraph: what does this change do? -->

## Why

<!-- One paragraph: what problem does it solve, or what improvement does it make?
     If you've used this in a real investigation, mention that — operator-tested
     changes get higher confidence. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This is in scope per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (correction, new durable diagnostic, adapter note, sanitization gap, typo/clarity)
- [ ] No customer names, internal page IDs, or employee names included
- [ ] If changing SKILL.md investigation protocol, opened an issue first for discussion

## Verification

<!-- If you've used this against real SparkPost traffic, briefly say what you saw.

      and got non-empty results" beats "looks right to me." -->

## Notes for the reviewer
